function.name: list_directory
function.description: List contents of a directory (files and subdirectories). Path must be under allowed roots.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read plain text content of a file. Size limit 1MB.

function.name: write_file
function.description: Create or overwrite a file with the given content. Path must be under allowed roots.

function.name: delete_file
function.description: Delete a file. Path must be under allowed roots.

function.name: create_directory
function.description: Create a directory. Path must be under allowed roots.

path.description: Absolute path for the new directory

function.name: set_layout
function.description: Change app layout: sidebar position (left/right).

function.name: task_list
function.description: List all persistent assistant tasks. Use this to understand current open work items before adding or changing tasks.

function.name: task_create
function.description: Create a new persistent assistant task that will be remembered across messages. Use concise, user-facing titles.

status.description: Workflow state for the task. Defaults to pending.

metadata.description: Optional extra structured information about the task.

function.name: task_update
function.description: Update an existing persistent assistant task (rename, change status, edit filterable tags, or attach metadata).

id.description: ID of the task to update

title.description: New title, if you want to rename the task

function.name: task_delete
function.description: Delete a persistent assistant task by ID when it is no longer relevant.

id.description: ID of the task to delete

function.name: task_clear_completed
function.description: Remove all tasks whose status is completed or cancelled to keep the task list tidy.

function.name: memory_set_fact
function.description: Store a stable user fact or preference in persistent memory.

function.name: memory_list_facts
function.description: List all stored persistent user facts and preferences.

function.name: memory_search_conversations
function.description: Search all prior conversations for a free-text query. Use whenever cross-thread recall, continuity, names, or prior decisions would help — not only when the user explicitly asks to search chat history.

function.name: web_search
function.description: Search the web for current information via Tavily.

function.name: note_list
function.description: List all persisted notes with their ids, titles, and timestamps.

function.name: note_create
function.description: Create a new note. For long chat replies, pass title and summary (1-3 sentences shown in chat), leave content empty, then write the full body in your following output. For background notes, pass title/content without summary.

title.description: Note title shown in the editor and inline preview

summary.description: Optional 1-3 sentence summary for chat when attaching a long write-up inline

content.description: Initial note body (usually empty when streaming a long reply)

function.name: note_read
function.description: Read one note by id.

function.name: note_save
function.description: Replace the full markdown content of a note by id.

function.name: note_delete
function.description: Delete a note by id.

function.name: get_datetime
function.description: Get the current date and time from the app host.
